global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with a central focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: Promoting late-night food delivery with a discount offer.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A bright yellow background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Food delivery box
elements.description: A stylized food delivery box with two compartments, depicted in a minimalistic design with a white outline.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon, possibly representing a delivery or food item, placed to the left of the food delivery box.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small rectangular area that is not clearly defined, possibly a decorative element or placeholder.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Late-night deals available

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' appears in a modern font at the top left corner, colored in black against the yellow background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' in bold, black font, located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '-30%' in bold, black text, positioned at the bottom left of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and minimalistic, food delivery, discount offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your cravings, delivered, Late-night deals available, SnapMeal, Order now, -30%
